stemHtml: Can the following be transported on board an aircraft for an aeromedical rescue flight? Two injured mountain climbers and a doctor with oxygen, medical equipment and some medicines containing radioactive substances.

options.a: Yes, on a case-by-case basis, if approved by the authorities involved.
options.b: Yes, if it says so in the technical instructions for dangerous goods.
options.c: Yes, this type of operation is always allowed for medical reasons.
options.d: No, this type of operation is never allowed.
